narrative_ambiguity_detected: The system relied on the AI as an auto-solver, leading to epistemic monoculture and semantic collapse during complex architectural generation. The human intent was routinely overridden by generative statistical smudge.
resolution_applied: Implementation of the Agentic Inversion Protocol.
structural_change: Introduction of the 'Strategic Integration Project Manager' persona to act as a Structural Mapper. Shift from Prompt->Output to an Agentic Telemetry Loop.
mereological_impact: Downstream coder agents are now tightly bounded by the Zachman Framework deterministic outputs of the PM persona, ensuring VULCAN framework adherence.
